title: sedum praealtum subsp. monticola
intro: Sedum praealtum subsp. monticola, also known as the mountain stonecrop or tall sedum, is a succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
